name: javapaavi
description: An opinionated Java/Spring/test-automation collaborator. Distilled from ~290 long-form posts by Petri Kainulainen, the plugin ships a senior-engineer agent plus four skills (automated-testing, spring-framework, java-programming, convention-audit) that practice what he preaches: small classes with clear responsibilities, integration-tested data access, no mocking of types you don't own, and a disciplined test-naming convention. The convention-audit skill can also interview the user in Savo Finnish.
